Some additional features that I think will be great is to include features such as analyzing family history to identify risks for conditions like Diabetes and Heart disease , offering a personalized daily health plan, and using AI to predict potential issues early. It should also integrate with wearable devices like a Apple Watch , provide motivational support, enable quick access to medical advice, and deliver adaptive, non-intrusive alerts.
